SEARCH
Package neqsim.standards.oilquality

Class Standard_ASTM_D86

java.lang.Object
neqsim.util.NamedBaseClass
neqsim.standards.Standard
neqsim.standards.oilquality.Standard_ASTM_D86
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, StandardInterface, NamedInterface
public class Standard_ASTM_D86 extends Standard
ASTM D86 - Standard Test Method for Distillation of Petroleum Products and Liquid Fuels at Atmospheric Pressure.

The atmospheric distillation curve is generated with a series of Pressure-Vapor-Fraction (PVF) flash calculations at constant atmospheric pressure: pressure is held fixed and temperature is solved for each target recovered fraction. The resulting curve maps percent distilled to boiling temperature.

The recovered fraction can be interpreted on three bases (see Standard_ASTM_D86.D86Basis): molar vapor fraction (default), recovered liquid-volume fraction, or an empirical TBP→D86 conversion (Riazi–Daubert / API). The class also derives the standard average boiling points (VABP, MABP, WABP, CABP, MeABP), the Watson (UOP) characterization factor, the D86 slope, and a recovery/loss/residue split, and supports a Sydney Young barometric-pressure correction.

This is the primary specification used for characterising crude oil cuts, gasoline, jet fuel, diesel, and fuel oils for refinery planning and product quality.

Calculated properties:

  • IBP (Initial Boiling Point)
  • T5, T10, T50, T90, T95 (temperatures at 5, 10, 50, 90, 95 vol% distilled)
  • FBP (Final Boiling Point)
  • VABP, MABP, WABP, CABP, MeABP (average boiling points)
  • Watson (UOP) characterization factor and D86 slope
  • Recovery, loss and residue percentages

Usage example: 

 
 Standard_ASTM_D86 standard = new Standard_ASTM_D86(oilFluid);
 standard.calculate();
 double ibp = standard.getValue("IBP", "C");
 double t50 = standard.getValue("T50", "C");
 double fbp = standard.getValue("FBP", "C");
Version:
2.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    Standard_ASTM_D86.D86Basis
    Reporting basis for the recovered (distilled) fraction of an ASTM D86 curve.

    barometricPressureMmHg
    Barometric (ambient) pressure for the Sydney Young correction, in mmHg.

    Reporting basis for the recovered fraction.
    private static final double[]
    CONV_A
    Coefficient a for T_TBP = a (T_D86)^b at each breakpoint (Kelvin).
    private static final double[]
    CONV_B
    Exponent b for T_TBP = a (T_D86)^b at each breakpoint (Kelvin).
    private static final double[]
    CONV_PCT
    Volume-percent breakpoints for the Riazi-Daubert ASTM D86 ↔ TBP interconversion.

    Distillation pressure in bara (standard atmospheric).

    Final Boiling Point in Kelvin.

    IBP
    Initial Boiling Point in Kelvin.
    private double[]

    Recovered liquid-volume fraction at each evaluated point (for liquid-volume basis).

    Logger object for class.

    lossFraction
    Loss volume fraction (light ends boiling below the IBP).

    residueFraction

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private double
    applyBarometricCorrectionK(double temperatureK)
    Applies the Sydney Young barometric-pressure correction used by ASTM D86 to convert an observed temperature to the equivalent at 760 mmHg.
    void
    calculate()
    calculate.
    void
    clearSpecLimits()
    Clears all product specification limits.
    private double[]
    computeABPs()
    Computes the component-based average boiling points and specific gravity from the fluid normal boiling points and liquid densities.
    private double
    computeRecoveredLiquidVolume(SystemInterface fluid, double beta, double[] vmFeed, double sumVfeed, int nComp)
    Computes the cumulative recovered liquid-volume fraction for the vapour formed at a flash point.
    private void
    computeRecoveryLossResidue(double[] zFeed, double[] vmFeed, double sumVfeed, int nComp)
    Splits the unrecovered fraction into a light-ends loss (components boiling below the IBP) and a heavy residue, on a liquid-volume basis, so that recovery + loss + residue = 100%.
    private double[]
    conversionCoefficients(double percent)
    Interpolates the Riazi-Daubert interconversion coefficients (a, b) at a given volume percent.
    private double
    convertTempFromC(double valueC, String unit)
    Converts a temperature in Celsius to the requested unit.
    private double
    d86ToTbpK(double d86K, double percent)
    Converts an ASTM D86 temperature to the equivalent TBP temperature using the Riazi-Daubert relation T_TBP = a (T_D86)^b (temperatures in Kelvin).
    double
    getBarometricPressure()
    Gets the barometric pressure used for the Sydney Young correction.
    Standard_ASTM_D86.D86Basis
    getBasis()
    Gets the active reporting basis.
    double
    getCABP()
    Gets the cubic average boiling point (CABP) from the component normal boiling points.
    double
    getCABP(String unit)
    Gets the cubic average boiling point (CABP) in a chosen unit.
    double[][]
    getD86Curve()
    Returns the ASTM D86 curve obtained by converting the simulated molar-equilibrium (TBP-like) curve with the Riazi-Daubert TBP→D86 relation.

    getDistillationCurve()
    Returns the full distillation curve data on the active reporting basis.
    double[][]
    getDistillationCurve(String tempUnit)
    Returns the full distillation curve data on the active reporting basis in a chosen unit.
    double[][]
    getDistillationCurveKelvin()
    Returns the full distillation curve data on the active reporting basis in Kelvin.
    double
    getDistillationPressure()
    Gets the distillation pressure.
    double
    getMABP()
    Gets the molal average boiling point (MABP) from the component normal boiling points.
    double
    getMABP(String unit)
    Gets the molal average boiling point (MABP) in a chosen unit.
    double
    getMeABP()
    Gets the mean average boiling point (MeABP), defined as the mean of MABP and CABP.
    double
    getMeABP(String unit)
    Gets the mean average boiling point (MeABP) in a chosen unit.
    double
    getPercentLoss()
    Gets the light-ends loss percentage (components boiling below the IBP).
    double
    getPercentRecovered()
    Gets the recovered percentage (the highest evaluated recovered point).
    double
    getPercentResidue()
    Gets the heavy residue percentage left in the flask.
    double
    getSlope()
    Gets the D86 slope, defined as (T90 - T10) / 80, in Celsius per percent.
    double
    getSpecificGravity()
    Gets the specific gravity (60/60 F) estimated as an ideal-solution mixture of the component liquid densities.
    double[][]
    getTBPCurve()
    Returns the simulated molar-equilibrium (TBP-like) distillation curve, independent of the active reporting basis.
    private double
    getTemperatureAtFraction(double fraction)
    Gets the temperature at a given distilled fraction on the molar (simulated) basis by linear interpolation.

    getUnit(String returnParameter)

    Gets the volume average boiling point (VABP) from the reported curve, defined as the average of the temperatures at 10, 30, 50, 70 and 90 percent recovered.

    double
    getWatsonK()
    Gets the Watson (UOP) characterization factor, K = (MeABP in Rankine)^(1/3) / SG.

    • interpolateK

      private double interpolateK(double[] fractionAxis, double[] temps, double fraction)
      Linear interpolation helper for a monotonically increasing fraction axis.
      Parameters:
      fractionAxis - the recovered-fraction values (x-axis)
      temps - the temperatures in Kelvin (y-axis)
      fraction - the recovered fraction to interpolate at (0.0 to 1.0)
      Returns:
      interpolated temperature in Kelvin

    • getTemperatureAtFraction

      private double getTemperatureAtFraction(double fraction)
      Gets the temperature at a given distilled fraction on the molar (simulated) basis by linear interpolation.
      Parameters:
      fraction - the recovered fraction (0.0 to 1.0)
      Returns:
      temperature in Kelvin at the specified fraction

    • liquidVolumeTemperatureAtFractionK

      private double liquidVolumeTemperatureAtFractionK(double fraction)
      Gets the temperature at a given recovered liquid-volume fraction by interpolation.
      Parameters:
      fraction - the recovered liquid-volume fraction (0.0 to 1.0)
      Returns:
      temperature in Kelvin at the specified fraction

    • reportedTemperatureAtFractionK

      private double reportedTemperatureAtFractionK(double fraction)
      Returns the reported temperature at a recovered fraction, honouring the active reporting basis and any barometric-pressure correction.
      Parameters:
      fraction - the recovered fraction (0.0 to 1.0)
      Returns:
      temperature in Kelvin

    • reportedIBP

      private double reportedIBP()
      Reported Initial Boiling Point honouring basis and barometric correction.
      Returns:
      IBP in Celsius

    • reportedFBP

      private double reportedFBP()
      Reported Final Boiling Point honouring basis and barometric correction.
      Returns:
      FBP in Celsius

    • applyBarometricCorrectionK

      private double applyBarometricCorrectionK(double temperatureK)
      Applies the Sydney Young barometric-pressure correction used by ASTM D86 to convert an observed temperature to the equivalent at 760 mmHg.
      Parameters:
      temperatureK - the observed temperature in Kelvin
      Returns:
      corrected temperature in Kelvin

    • conversionCoefficients

      private double[] conversionCoefficients(double percent)
      Interpolates the Riazi-Daubert interconversion coefficients (a, b) at a given volume percent.
      Parameters:
      percent - the volume percent distilled (0 to 100)
      Returns:
      a two-element array {a, b}

    • tbpToD86K

      private double tbpToD86K(double tbpK, double percent)
      Converts a TBP temperature to the equivalent ASTM D86 temperature using the Riazi-Daubert relation T_TBP = a (T_D86)^b (temperatures in Kelvin).
      Parameters:
      tbpK - TBP temperature in Kelvin
      percent - the volume percent distilled (0 to 100)
      Returns:
      ASTM D86 temperature in Kelvin

    • d86ToTbpK

      private double d86ToTbpK(double d86K, double percent)
      Converts an ASTM D86 temperature to the equivalent TBP temperature using the Riazi-Daubert relation T_TBP = a (T_D86)^b (temperatures in Kelvin).
      Parameters:
      d86K - ASTM D86 temperature in Kelvin
      percent - the volume percent distilled (0 to 100)
      Returns:
      TBP temperature in Kelvin

    • computeRecoveredLiquidVolume

      private double computeRecoveredLiquidVolume(SystemInterface fluid, double beta, double[] vmFeed, double sumVfeed, int nComp)
      Computes the cumulative recovered liquid-volume fraction for the vapour formed at a flash point.
      Parameters:
      fluid - the flashed fluid holding gas and liquid phases
      beta - the molar vapor fraction at this point
      vmFeed - per-component liquid molar volume proxy (molar mass / liquid density)
      sumVfeed - the feed total liquid-volume proxy
      nComp - the number of components
      Returns:
      recovered liquid-volume fraction (0.0 to 1.0)

    • computeRecoveryLossResidue

      private void computeRecoveryLossResidue(double[] zFeed, double[] vmFeed, double sumVfeed, int nComp)
      Splits the unrecovered fraction into a light-ends loss (components boiling below the IBP) and a heavy residue, on a liquid-volume basis, so that recovery + loss + residue = 100%.
      Parameters:
      zFeed - per-component overall mole fractions
      vmFeed - per-component liquid molar volume proxy
      sumVfeed - the feed total liquid-volume proxy
      nComp - the number of components

    • computeABPs

      private double[] computeABPs()
      Computes the component-based average boiling points and specific gravity from the fluid normal boiling points and liquid densities.
      Returns:
      a four-element array {MABP_K, WABP_K, CABP_K, SG}

    • convertTempFromC

      private double convertTempFromC(double valueC, String unit)
      Converts a temperature in Celsius to the requested unit.
      Parameters:
      valueC - the temperature in Celsius
      unit - the target unit ("C", "K", "F" or "R")
      Returns:
      the converted temperature

    • getDistillationCurve

      public double[][] getDistillationCurve()
      Returns the full distillation curve data on the active reporting basis.
      Returns:
      a two-dimensional array where [i][0] is volume percent and [i][1] is temperature in Celsius

    • getDistillationCurve

      public double[][] getDistillationCurve(String tempUnit)
      Returns the full distillation curve data on the active reporting basis in a chosen unit.
      Parameters:
      tempUnit - the temperature unit ("C", "K", "F" or "R")
      Returns:
      a two-dimensional array where [i][0] is volume percent and [i][1] is temperature in the requested unit

    • getDistillationCurveKelvin

      public double[][] getDistillationCurveKelvin()
      Returns the full distillation curve data on the active reporting basis in Kelvin.
      Returns:
      a two-dimensional array where [i][0] is volume percent and [i][1] is temperature in Kelvin

    • getTBPCurve

      public double[][] getTBPCurve()
      Returns the simulated molar-equilibrium (TBP-like) distillation curve, independent of the active reporting basis.
      Returns:
      a two-dimensional array where [i][0] is volume percent and [i][1] is temperature in Celsius

    • getD86Curve

      public double[][] getD86Curve()
      Returns the ASTM D86 curve obtained by converting the simulated molar-equilibrium (TBP-like) curve with the Riazi-Daubert TBP→D86 relation.
      Returns:
      a two-dimensional array where [i][0] is volume percent and [i][1] is temperature in Celsius

    • getDistillationPressure

      public double getDistillationPressure()
      Gets the distillation pressure.
      Returns:
      distillation pressure in bara

    • setDistillationPressure

      public void setDistillationPressure(double pressure)
      Sets the distillation pressure. Default is 1.01325 bara (standard atmospheric).
      Parameters:
      pressure - distillation pressure in bara

    • getBasis

      public Standard_ASTM_D86.D86Basis getBasis()
      Gets the active reporting basis.
      Returns:
      the Standard_ASTM_D86.D86Basis currently used for reporting

    • setBasis

      public void setBasis(Standard_ASTM_D86.D86Basis basis)
      Sets the reporting basis for the recovered fraction.
      Parameters:
      basis - the Standard_ASTM_D86.D86Basis to use; if null, defaults to MOLAR

    • setBarometricPressure

      public void setBarometricPressure(double pressure, String unit)
      Sets the barometric (ambient) pressure used for the Sydney Young correction.
      Parameters:
      pressure - the barometric pressure
      unit - the unit ("mmHg", "bar", "bara", "kPa", "Pa", "atm" or "psia")

    • getBarometricPressure

      public double getBarometricPressure()
      Gets the barometric pressure used for the Sydney Young correction.
      Returns:
      barometric pressure in mmHg

    • setSpecLimit

      public void setSpecLimit(String pointKey, double maxTemperatureC)
      Adds or updates a product specification limit checked by isOnSpec().
      Parameters:
      pointKey - the report point (e.g. "T90", "FBP", "IBP")
      maxTemperatureC - the maximum allowed temperature in Celsius

    • clearSpecLimits

      public void clearSpecLimits()
      Clears all product specification limits.

    • getVABP

      public double getVABP()
      Gets the volume average boiling point (VABP) from the reported curve, defined as the average of the temperatures at 10, 30, 50, 70 and 90 percent recovered.
      Returns:
      VABP in Celsius

      public double getVABP(String unit)
      Gets the volume average boiling point (VABP) in a chosen unit.

      unit - the temperature unit ("C", "K", "F" or "R")
      Returns:
      VABP in the requested unit

      public double getSlope()
      Gets the D86 slope, defined as (T90 - T10) / 80, in Celsius per percent.

      the D86 slope in Celsius per percent

      Returns:

      Gets the weight average boiling point (WABP) from the component normal boiling points.

      Returns:

      public double getCABP()

    • getCABP

      public double getCABP(String unit)
      Gets the cubic average boiling point (CABP) in a chosen unit.

      unit - the temperature unit ("C", "K", "F" or "R")
      Returns:
      CABP in the requested unit

    • getMeABP

      public double getMeABP()
      Gets the mean average boiling point (MeABP), defined as the mean of MABP and CABP.
      Returns:
      MeABP in Celsius

    • getMeABP

      public double getMeABP(String unit)
      Gets the mean average boiling point (MeABP) in a chosen unit.
      Parameters:
      unit - the temperature unit ("C", "K", "F" or "R")
      Returns:
      MeABP in the requested unit

    • getSpecificGravity

      public double getSpecificGravity()
      Gets the specific gravity (60/60 F) estimated as an ideal-solution mixture of the component liquid densities.
      Returns:
      specific gravity (dimensionless)

    • getWatsonK

      public double getWatsonK()
      Gets the Watson (UOP) characterization factor, K = (MeABP in Rankine)^(1/3) / SG.
      Returns:
      the Watson characterization factor (dimensionless)

    • getPercentRecovered

      public double getPercentRecovered()
      Gets the recovered percentage (the highest evaluated recovered point).
      Returns:
      percent recovered

    • getPercentLoss

      public double getPercentLoss()
      Gets the light-ends loss percentage (components boiling below the IBP).
      Returns:
      percent loss

    • getPercentResidue

      public double getPercentResidue()
      Gets the heavy residue percentage left in the flask.
      Returns:
      percent residue
